classes.name: RTDetrV2MultiscaleDeformableAttention
classes.rationale: L2 RTDetrV2MultiscaleDeformableAttention (Linear q/k/v/output, Softmax, MultiScaleDeformableAttentionV2 sampling primitive) matches HF compute including offset_scale/method dispatch.

classes.name: RTDetrV2MLP
classes.rationale: Two-layer fc1+activation+fc2 with config-driven activation; covered by RTDetrV2EncoderLayer fc1/fc2 path inside L2/rtdetrv2_layers.py (also exposes MLPPredictionHead).

classes.name: RTDetrV2SelfAttention
classes.rationale: Decomposed q/k/v/o multi-head with optional position embeddings on Q/K (not V); RTDetrV2MultiheadAttention in L2 mirrors this layout (BMM-based, softmax+dropout).

classes.name: RTDetrV2DecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring class: self-attn -> encoder_attn (deformable cross) -> mlp with LN; composes.

classes.name: RTDetrV2Decoder
classes.rationale: Stack of decoder layers with iterative box refinement; L3 file present. Composition orchestrator.

classes.name: RTDetrV2FrozenBatchNorm2d
classes.rationale: Frozen affine batchnorm with running stats; L1/frozen_batch_norm2d.py is the dedicated kernel.

classes.name: RTDetrV2ConvEncoder
classes.rationale: Backbone wrapper that loads + freezes BN; L3 file is the orchestrator.

classes.name: RTDetrV2ConvNormLayer
classes.rationale: Conv2d + BatchNorm2d + activation; both rtdetrv2_conv_norm.py and rtdetrv2_layers.py expose this composite.

classes.name: RTDetrV2EncoderLayer
classes.rationale: Pre/post-norm self-attn + fc1+activation+fc2 path; matches kb-nano L2 encoder_layer wiring.

classes.name: RTDetrV2RepVggBlock
classes.rationale: conv1+conv2 sum followed by activation; repvgg block.

classes.name: RTDetrV2CSPRepLayer
classes.rationale: Cross-Stage Partial layer with bottleneck stack of RepVGG blocks; covered.

classes.name: RTDetrV2SinePositionEmbedding
classes.rationale: Pure 2D sin/cos position generation (no parameters); composes from torch.arange/sin/cos.

classes.name: RTDetrV2AIFILayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: SinePositionEmbedding + stack of EncoderLayers; composes from rtdetrv2_encoder_layer.

classes.name: RTDetrV2HybridEncoder
classes.rationale: AIFI + FPN top-down + PAN bottom-up wiring; covered by L3 hybrid_encoder.py.

classes.name: RTDetrV2Model
classes.rationale: Top-level encoder-decoder; L3 wiring file exists.

classes.name: RTDetrV2MLPPredictionHead
classes.rationale: Stacked Linear with ReLU between (final no activation); kb-nano file present.

classes.name: RwkvLinearAttention
classes.rationale: RWKV-1 custom CUDA WKV kernel (autograd.Function). kb-nano only has RWKV-7 ops (chunk_rwkv7, fused_recurrent_rwkv7, rwkv7_recurrence) which are different recurrences; no direct mapping for RWKV-1.

classes.name: RwkvSelfAttention
classes.rationale: RWKV-1 time-mix linear attention (time_decay, time_first, time_mix_key/value/receptance, ZeroPad2d shift). kb-nano has rwkv7_attention.py only; the RWKV-7 architecture differs (delta-rule recurrence, no time_first/time_decay scalars). No matching kernel.

classes.name: RwkvFeedForward
classes.rationale: RWKV-1 channel-mix block with time_mix_key/receptance, squared ReLU activation, sigmoid receptance gate. rwkv7_ffn.py implements RWKV-7 channel mix (different mixing scheme). No exact match.

classes.name: RwkvBlock
classes.rationale: Wiring: pre_ln (layer 0) + ln1 + attention + ln2 + feed_forward; composes.

classes.name: RwkvModel
classes.rationale: Top-level RWKV-1 model; no kb-nano coverage.

classes.name: RwkvForCausalLM
classes.rationale: L4 pipeline wiring; no kb-nano coverage for RWKV-1.

caveats: kb-nano only ships RWKV-7 kernels (chunk_rwkv7, fused_recurrent_rwkv7, rwkv7_attention, rwkv7_ffn). RWKV-1 (this folder) uses a different recurrence (time_first/time_decay scalars, additive log-space WKV) and is NOT covered.

classes.name: SamPatchEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Conv2d patch projection + permute; composes from L1/conv2d.py.

classes.name: SamMLPBlock
classes.rationale: Two-layer Linear+ACT2FN[hidden_act='gelu']+Linear MLP. Not SwiGLU. SAM v1 has no kb-nano L2 file (SAM3 family has dedicated files but SAM v1 doesn't). Composes from L1/linear.py + L1/gelu.py.

classes.name: SamLayerNorm
classes.rationale: ConvNeXt-style LayerNorm with channels_first/last; composes from L1/layer_norm.py with permute.

classes.name: SamAttention
classes.rationale: Two-way attention (q/k/v separate sources, downsample) used inside the mask-decoder. Non-causal SDPA-style. SAM v1 has no kb-nano L2 file; closest analog is sam3_cross_attention.py but signatures differ. Composes from L1/sdpa.py + L1/linear.py.

classes.name: SamTwoWayAttentionBlock
classes.rationale: Wiring: self-attn + 2x cross-attn + MLP + 4 LayerNorms; composes.

classes.name: SamFeedForward
classes.rationale: Generic Linear+ReLU stack with optional sigmoid; no SAM v1 kb-nano file. Composes.

classes.name: SamVisionAttention
classes.rationale: ViT-Det-style windowed attention with decomposed relative position bias (rel_pos_h/w, get_rel_pos / get_decomposed_rel_pos via einsum). SAM v1 has no kb-nano file; sam3_vit_attention.py uses 2D RoPE rather than additive rel-pos bias, so structurally distinct.

classes.name: SamVisionSdpaAttention
classes.rationale: SDPA variant of SamVisionAttention; same compute, different backend dispatch.

classes.name: SamVisionLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: LN + windowed attn + LN + MLP; composes.

classes.name: SamModel
classes.rationale: Top-level SAM v1 segmentation pipeline; no kb-nano L4 (sam3.py and sam3_tracker.py exist but for SAM3).

caveats: SAM v1 has NO dedicated kb-nano files (the sam3_* and sam3_tracker_* files are for SAM3, which uses 2D RoPE not decomposed-rel-pos-bias). SAM v1 vision attention with decomposed rel-pos bias (mvitv2 paper) would need to be composed from L1/linear.py + L1/sdpa.py + manual einsum + interpolate.

classes.name: Sam2VisionNeck
classes.rationale: FPN-style neck with multi-level conv projection; composes.

classes.name: Sam2MultiScaleAttention
classes.rationale: Hiera-style multi-scale attention with Q-pooling. SAM2 vision is Hiera not ViT-Det. No kb-nano file (sam3 uses different ViT).

classes.name: Sam2MultiScaleBlock
classes.rationale: Wiring: LN + MultiScaleAttention + LN + MLP with optional Q-pooling; composes.

classes.name: Sam2Attention
classes.rationale: Two-way attention (mask decoder), q/k/v from different sources with downsample; no kb-nano file.

classes.name: Sam2Model
classes.rationale: Top-level SAM2 segmentation pipeline; no kb-nano L4 for SAM2 (sam3.py is for SAM3).

caveats: SAM2 vision uses Hiera (multi-scale with Q-pooling) which differs from SAM3's ViT (RoPE). kb-nano sam3_* files don't apply. No SAM2 kb-nano files exist.

sam2_video extends SAM2 with video memory attention (memory bank, RoPE-attention, memory encoder/fuser). No SAM2/SAM2-video kb-nano files exist; sam3_tracker_video and sam3_memory_attention/encoder are for SAM3-tracker, not SAM2-video. Skipping detailed class enumeration as no kb-nano coverage exists.

classes.name: Sam3MLP
classes.rationale: Two-layer fc1+activation+fc2 with hidden_act='gelu' (and 'relu' in detr_encoder/decoder/geometry_encoder configs). sam3_vit_mlp.py is the closest match for the gelu variant; relu/dropout variants differ slightly but share the structure. CAVEAT: HF Sam3MLP applies dropout BEFORE activation (line 292-293), kb-nano sam3_vit_mlp.py applies after.

classes.name: Sam3Attention
classes.rationale: Multi-head Q/K/V with separate sources (used as self-attn when Q=K=V and as cross-attn). Non-causal, SDPA-routed. sam3_cross_attention.py covers this exact pattern (DenseAttention or scaled_dot_product_attention with optional mask).

classes.name: Sam3ViTRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: 2D axial RoPE with x/y position freqs + repeat_interleave; sam3_rope.py implements Sam3RoPE2D matching this exact construction (verified).

classes.name: Sam3ViTRoPEAttention
classes.rationale: Self-attention with 2D RoPE applied to Q/K via apply_rotary_pos_emb_2d (pairwise rotation); sam3_vit_attention.py uses Sam3RoPE2D + DenseAttention exactly.

classes.name: Sam3ViTPatchEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Conv2d patch projection; composes from L1/conv2d.py.

classes.name: Sam3ViTEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Wiring: PatchEmbeddings + tiled position embeddings + dropout; composes.

classes.name: Sam3ViTLayer
classes.rationale: ViT layer wiring: LN + windowed RoPE-attn + DropPath + LN + MLP + LayerScale; covered by L3 sam3_vit_block.py.

classes.name: Sam3SinePositionEmbedding
classes.rationale: 1D/2D sinusoidal position encoding; verified L1 file exists for this.

classes.name: Sam3GeometryEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: LN + self-attn + LN + cross-attn + LN + MLP via Sam3Attention/Sam3MLP; composes (uses sam3_cross_attention.py + sam3_vit_mlp.py).

classes.name: Sam3GeometryEncoder
classes.rationale: Box prompt encoder with ROI align + position encoding + transformer layers; sam3_prompt_encoder.py covers.

classes.name: Sam3DetrEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: DETR encoder layer wiring (self-attn + cross-attn + MLP); covered.

classes.name: Sam3DetrDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Self-attn + text-cross-attn + vision-cross-attn + MLP; covered by L3 decoder_layer.py.

classes.name: Sam3DotProductScoring
classes.rationale: Score head with text-MLP + projection + dot product + clamp; composes.

classes.name: Sam3PixelDecoder
classes.rationale: FPN pixel decoder with Conv2d + GroupNorm; covered.

classes.name: Sam3LiteTextMobileOneBlock
classes.rationale: Depthwise Conv2d + BatchNorm2d skip; composes from L1/conv2d.py + L1/batch_norm2d.py.

classes.name: Sam3LiteTextConvMLP
classes.rationale: 1x1 Conv2d MLP with hidden_act='relu'; composes from L1/conv2d.py + L1/relu.py. No SwiGLU.

classes.name: Sam3LiteTextConvolutionalFeedForward
classes.rationale: Depthwise conv + BN + ConvMLP wiring; composes.

classes.name: Sam3LiteTextLayerScaledResidual
classes.rationale: Per-channel layer scale residual helper; composes.

classes.name: Sam3LiteTextRepMixer
classes.rationale: RepMixer with reference BN + MobileOneBlock; composes.

classes.name: Sam3LiteTextTextAttention
classes.rationale: Multi-head self-attention non-causal with dispatch via ALL_ATTENTION_FUNCTIONS; matches sam3_text_attention.py (ResidualAttentionBlock-style with q/k/v Linear and DenseAttention).

classes.name: Sam3LiteTextTextMLP
classes.rationale: Two-layer Linear + activation (config hidden_act='relu' for text encoder). No exact kb-nano file matching ReLU 2-layer MLP for text encoder; composes from L1/linear.py + L1/relu.py. CAVEAT: kb-nano sam3_text_attention.py uses GELU MLP fused inside (not separate).

classes.name: Sam3LiteTextTextEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: Pre-norm self-attn + MLP wiring; covered by L3 sam3_text_encoder_layer.py (also pre-norm).

classes.name: Sam3LiteTextAttention
classes.rationale: Multi-head Q/K/V with separate sources (self+cross); same as Sam3Attention. Maps to sam3_cross_attention.py.

classes.name: Sam3LiteTextSinePositionEmbedding
classes.rationale: Sinusoidal position encoding; same as Sam3SinePositionEmbedding.

classes.name: Sam3LiteTextGeometryEncoder
classes.rationale: Box prompt encoder; same architecture as Sam3GeometryEncoder.

classes.name: Sam3LiteTextDetrEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: DETR encoder layer; same as Sam3DetrEncoderLayer.

classes.name: Sam3LiteTextModel
classes.rationale: Top-level pipeline; no dedicated L4 (sam3.py is for full SAM3 ViT, not the lite-text MobileOne backbone).

caveats: sam3_lite_text uses a MobileOne (RepMixer + ConvFFN) backbone instead of ViT; the RepMixer/MobileOne path has NO kb-nano coverage. The DETR encoder/decoder/mask-decoder + text-encoder portions reuse Sam3-family kb-nano files.

classes.name: Sam3TrackerAttention
classes.rationale: Two-way q/k/v attention (separate sources, downsample); maps to sam3_cross_attention.py.

classes.name: Sam3TrackerVideoPositionEmbeddingSine
classes.rationale: Sinusoidal 2D pos embed; covered by L1.

classes.name: Sam3TrackerVideoAttention
classes.rationale: Two-way q/k/v attention; maps to sam3_cross_attention.py.

classes.name: Sam3TrackerVideoRoPEAttention
classes.rationale: RoPE-augmented attention used in memory attention; sam3_rope_attention.py L1 file matches.

classes.name: Sam3TrackerVideoMemoryAttentionLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring of self-attn + cross-attn + FFN with RoPE; composes.

classes.name: Sam3TrackerVideoModel
classes.rationale: Top-level wiring; composes (no dedicated sam3_tracker_video L4).

caveats: sam3_video is mostly an inference-session/cache wrapper around Sam3 + Sam3Tracker components; minimal new compute classes. L4 sam3_video.py file present.

classes.name: SamHQVisionAttention
classes.rationale: ViT-Det windowed attention with decomposed rel-pos bias (same as SamVisionAttention). No kb-nano file (sam3_vit_attention.py uses 2D RoPE not rel-pos).

classes.name: SamHQAttention
classes.rationale: Two-way attention from mask decoder; same as SAM v1. No kb-nano coverage.

classes.name: SamHQMaskDecoder
classes.rationale: Extends SAM mask decoder with HQ token and HQ-feature path; no kb-nano file.

classes.name: SamHQModel
classes.rationale: Top-level pipeline; no kb-nano L4 for SAM-HQ.

caveats: SAM-HQ inherits SAM v1's ViT-Det attention with decomposed rel-pos bias. kb-nano has NO file for this variant (sam3 family uses RoPE).

classes.name: SeamlessM4TConformerRotaryPositionalEmbedding
classes.rationale: Conformer RoPE (different from Llama RoPE - applied to relative-attention scores). No kb-nano match.

classes.name: SeamlessM4TConformerRelPositionalEmbedding
classes.rationale: Shaw-style relative positional embedding for Conformer; composes.

classes.name: SeamlessM4TConformerFeedForward
classes.rationale: Two-layer Linear with swish (=silu) activation, sandwich pattern in conformer; composes from L1/linear.py + L1/silu.py (NOT silu_and_mul; this is a regular 2-layer FFN).

classes.name: SeamlessM4TConformerConvolutionModule
classes.rationale: Pointwise conv + GLU + depthwise conv + BN + Swish + pointwise conv; conformer convolution module. No kb-nano file.

classes.name: SeamlessM4TConformerSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Conformer-style attention with relative position embeddings (Shaw or Rotary); decomposes from L1/linear.py + L1/sdpa.py + custom relpos.

classes.name: SeamlessM4TConformerEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: Conformer macaron-style: FFN + self-attn + Conv + FFN; composes.

classes.name: SeamlessM4TAttention
classes.rationale: Standard transformer multi-head Q/K/V Linear+SDPA attention used in encoder/decoder/cross. No specialized kb-nano file (whisper_attention.py is too whisper-specific).

classes.name: SeamlessM4TFeedForwardNetwork
classes.rationale: Two-layer Linear + activation_function='relu' + Linear; composes from L1/linear.py + L1/relu.py.

classes.name: SeamlessM4TEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: LN + self-attn + LN + FFN; composes.

classes.name: SeamlessM4TDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: LN + self-attn + LN + cross-attn + LN + FFN; composes.

caveats: SeamlessM4T uses Conformer for speech (macaron FFN + relpos attention + conv module) and standard Transformer for text. Neither has kb-nano coverage. The HiFiGAN vocoder is also unique.

classes.name: SeamlessM4Tv2ConformerSelfAttention
classes.rationale: Conformer self-attention with relative pos; composes.

classes.name: SeamlessM4Tv2Attention
classes.rationale: Standard multi-head attention; no kb-nano file.

caveats: v2 adds non-autoregressive T2U decoder + improved Conformer; same lack of kb-nano coverage as v1.

classes.name: SeedOssMLP
classes.rationale: SwiGLU pattern (gate_proj, up_proj, down_proj, act_fn=ACT2FN['silu']) with optional residual_dropout. Maps to llama_mlp.py (SiluAndMul). The dropout after down_proj is an extra wrinkle the kb-nano file doesn't model, but since residual_dropout=0 by default it's an inert difference.

classes.name: SeedOssAttention
classes.rationale: Standard Llama-style GQA attention with q/k/v separate projections, RoPE via apply_rotary_pos_emb, KV-cache update. Maps to LlamaAttention. is_causal=True. Has additional residual_dropout post o_proj (default 0).

classes.name: SeedOssRotaryEmbedding
classes.rationale: Standard Llama RoPE (in modeling file, identical to LlamaRotaryEmbedding).

classes.name: SegformerEfficientSelfAttention
classes.rationale: PvT-style efficient attention with Conv-based key/value sequence reduction (sr_ratio); custom layout (no kb-nano file). Composes from L1/linear.py + L1/conv2d.py + L1/sdpa.py + L1/layer_norm.py.

classes.name: SegformerMixFFN
classes.rationale: Linear -> DWConv -> GELU -> Linear (mix-FFN); custom, no kb-nano file.

classes.name: SegformerMLP
classes.rationale: Single Linear projection per stage; composes.

caveats: SegFormer's MiT backbone uses sequence-reduction attention + mix-FFN with depthwise conv. No kb-nano coverage.

classes.name: SegGptAttention
classes.rationale: ViT-Det-style attention with decomposed rel-pos bias (rel_pos_h/w via einsum). Same pattern as SamVisionAttention. No kb-nano file (sam3 uses RoPE).

classes.name: SegGptMlp
classes.rationale: Linear+gelu+Linear (copied from SamMLPBlock); composes from L1/linear.py + L1/gelu.py.

caveats: SegGPT uses ViT-Det attention with decomposed rel-pos bias; no kb-nano coverage.

classes.name: SEWAttention
classes.rationale: Standard Bart-style Q/K/V Linear+SDPA attention. encoder_attention.py is for BERT (varlen); no exact match.

classes.name: SEWFeedForward
classes.rationale: Two-layer Linear + GELU + Linear; composes from L1/linear.py + L1/gelu.py. Not SwiGLU.

classes.name: SEWEncoder
classes.rationale: Stack with squeeze (avg pool) + upsampling; composes.

caveats: SEW (Squeezed and Efficient Wav2Vec) is a wav2vec2-family speech model with a downsample-encoder-upsample pattern. No kb-nano coverage.

classes.name: DisentangledSelfAttention
classes.rationale: DeBERTa-v2 disentangled attention with content-to-position and position-to-content score paths. No kb-nano file (encoder_attention.py is plain BERT-style).

classes.name: ConvLayer
classes.rationale: Convolutional residual block inside encoder; composes.

caveats: SEW-D combines SEW conv front-end with DeBERTa-v2 disentangled attention. The DisentangledSelfAttention has no kb-nano analog (would require log_bucket_position + relative-content-position bias paths).

classes.name: ShieldGemma2ForImageClassification
classes.rationale: ShieldGemma2 is a thin classification head on top of a Gemma3-family multimodal model (re-exported as PaliGemma-style). All compute classes are imported from gemma3 / paligemma; this folder only adds the safety-classification pipeline wiring. The Gemma3 attention/MLP/RoPE map to the gemma4 family of kb-nano files (gemma4_attention.py, gemma4_mlp.py, gemma4_decoder.py, gemma4_routing.py).

caveats: Folder is essentially a wrapper around an external Gemma3 / PaliGemma model + classification head; minimal new compute defined here.

classes.name: SiglipVisionEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Conv2d patch projection + learned absolute position embedding; composes.

classes.name: SiglipAttention
classes.rationale: Multi-head Q/K/V Linear with separate (non-fused) projections, non-causal SDPA-routed. siglip_attention.py exactly mirrors this (q_proj/k_proj/v_proj/out_proj + DenseAttention).

classes.name: SiglipMLP
classes.rationale: Two-layer Linear+ACT2FN[hidden_act]+Linear, with hidden_act='gelu_pytorch_tanh' default. CAVEAT: kb-nano siglip_mlp.py uses GELU(approximate='none'), NOT tanh-approximated GELU; this is a numerical mismatch worth fixing in kb-nano (or noting as a known divergence).

classes.name: SiglipMultiheadAttentionPoolingHead
classes.rationale: Learned-probe attention pooling (LayerNorm, MultiheadAttention, MLP). attention_pool.py implements this pattern (cls_token + K/V + SDPA).

caveats: kb-nano L2/siglip_mlp.py uses GELU(approximate='none') but HF SigLIP defaults hidden_act='gelu_pytorch_tanh' (tanh approximation) - numerical mismatch; would need approximate='tanh' to be exactly correct.

classes.name: Siglip2VisionEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Variable-resolution patch embeddings (NaFlex-style); custom, no kb-nano file.

classes.name: Siglip2TextEmbeddings
classes.rationale: Same as Siglip text embeddings; composes.

caveats: Siglip2 adds NaFlex variable-resolution patch embeddings (with idx-aware position embeddings). Same gelu_pytorch_tanh divergence as Siglip.

classes.name: SLANetSLAHead
classes.rationale: Inherits SLANeXt SLA head; autoregressive structure prediction.

classes.name: SLANetConvLayer
classes.rationale: Conv2d + BN + activation (hidden_act='hardswish'); composes from L1/conv2d.py + L1/batch_norm2d.py + L1/hardswish.py.

classes.name: SLANetDepthwiseSeparableConvLayer
classes.rationale: Depthwise + pointwise conv (no SE in SLANet override); composes.

classes.name: SLANetCSPLayer
classes.rationale: CSP layer with bottleneck stack; composes.

classes.name: SLANetBackbone
classes.rationale: Backbone wiring; composes (PP-LCNet not in kb-nano).

caveats: SLANet uses PP-LCNet backbone with hardswish activation + CSP-PAN neck for table recognition. No kb-nano coverage. Note: hidden_act='hardswish' (rare); kb-nano has L1/hardswish.py if needed.

classes.name: SLANeXtVisionAttention
classes.rationale: Inherits GotOcr2VisionAttention which is SAM-style ViT-Det attention with decomposed rel-pos bias (per modeling_slanext.py:43, has rel_pos_h/w + qkv + decomposed bias). No kb-nano file.

classes.name: SLANeXtAttentionGRUCell
classes.rationale: Bahdanau-style attention + GRUCell for autoregressive structure decoding; composes (custom).

classes.name: SLANeXtMLP
classes.rationale: Linear + Linear + activation (Identity by default); composes.

caveats: SLANeXt uses GOT-OCR2 ViT-Det vision encoder + AttentionGRUCell autoregressive decoder. No kb-nano coverage.

classes.name: SmolLM3Attention
classes.rationale: Llama-style GQA with NoPE-layer support (no_rope_layers) + optional sliding window. LlamaAttention covers GQA + RoPE + sliding-window; the NoPE skip is a layer-config knob (use_rope=False) which the kb-nano LlamaAttention already supports via its 'nope' flag.

classes.name: SmolLM3RMSNorm
classes.rationale: Inherited from Llama (in modeling but originates in Llama).

classes.name: SmolLM3MLP
classes.rationale: Standard SwiGLU MLP (silu) inherited from Llama.

classes.name: SmolLM3Model
classes.rationale: Qwen2-style model (uses Qwen2 layer norms etc); LlamaEngine compatible.

classes.name: SmolVLMVisionAttention
classes.rationale: Idefics3/SigLIP-style vision attention (hidden_act='gelu_pytorch_tanh'); same q/k/v separate Linear pattern.

classes.name: SmolVLMVisionMLP
classes.rationale: fc1+gelu_pytorch_tanh+fc2 (same as SigLIP). CAVEAT: kb-nano siglip_mlp.py uses approximate='none'.

caveats: SmolVLM = SigLIP vision encoder + connector + Llama text LM. The vision side maps to siglip_attention.py / siglip_mlp.py / siglip_encoder_layer.py; LM side uses LlamaEngine but the multimodal wiring has no dedicated kb-nano L4.

classes.name: SolarOpenDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Inherits Llama decoder layer but replaces self.mlp with SolarOpenMoE.

classes.name: SolarOpenMoE
classes.rationale: Glm4 MoE with shared expert + sigmoid routing + e_score_correction_bias + group-topk. Maps to shared_expert_moe.py with routing='sigmoid', correction_bias=True, shared_expert_attr_name='shared_experts'.

classes.name: SolarOpenAttention
classes.rationale: LlamaAttention with bias=False on o_proj override. LlamaAttention in kb-nano covers this.

classes.name: SolarOpenForCausalLM
classes.rationale: Pipeline; no dedicated solar_open L4 (deepseek.py / kimi_linear.py shared-expert MoE engines are conceptually similar but not the same).

classes.name: SolarOpenMLP
classes.rationale: Note: SolarOpenMLP is defined in modeling_solar_open.py (not modular). It's a standard SwiGLU (gate_proj/up_proj/down_proj, hidden_act='silu'). Used as the shared expert with intermediate_size=moe_intermediate_size*n_shared_experts.

classes.name: SolarOpenTopkRouter
classes.rationale: Linear router with sigmoid + e_score_correction_bias; included inside shared_expert_moe.py wiring.

classes.name: SolarOpenNaiveMoe
classes.rationale: Naive scatter-gather MoE; kb-nano routes to fused_experts.py for actual GPU dispatch.

caveats: SolarOpen is essentially Glm4-MoE with TP overrides. The shared-expert MoE pattern (sigmoid + correction_bias) maps cleanly to kb-nano's shared_expert_moe.py (which already supports routing='sigmoid', correction_bias=True).

classes.name: SpeechEncoderDecoderModel
classes.rationale: Generic wrapper that ties an arbitrary speech encoder (e.g. Wav2Vec2/HuBERT) with an arbitrary text decoder (e.g. Bart). Pure wiring class; composes.

caveats: This folder contains only the wrapper class - all compute is delegated to the underlying encoder/decoder models referenced via config.

classes.name: Conv1dSubsampler
classes.rationale: Two-layer Conv1d with GLU subsampling for speech features; composes from L1/conv1d.py.

classes.name: Speech2TextAttention
classes.rationale: Bart-style multi-head attention (Q/K/V Linear, optional cross-attn, KV-cache). No exact kb-nano file (whisper_attention.py is whisper-specific). Composes from L1/linear.py + L1/sdpa.py.

classes.name: Speech2TextEncoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: LN + self-attn + LN + FFN (relu); composes.

classes.name: Speech2TextDecoderLayer
classes.rationale: Wiring: LN + self-attn + LN + cross-attn + LN + FFN; composes.

classes.name: Speech2TextEncoder
classes.rationale: Conv subsampler + sinusoidal pos + encoder stack; composes.

caveats: Speech2Text is a Bart-style speech-to-text encoder-decoder with Conv subsampler. activation_function='relu' (FFN). No kb-nano coverage for the specific seq2seq speech-to-text architecture (whisper_*.py files are whisper-specific).
